title: Sales Operations Analyst
description: PNC Financial is seeking a Sales Operations Analyst to optimize our sales processes, manage CRM systems, and provide analytical support to our banking teams. You will maintain customer data quality, track sales metrics, generate reports, and identify opportunities to improve sales effectiveness.
responsibilities: Maintain and optimize our CRM system and customer database
Generate sales reports and analyze performance metrics
Develop dashboards to track sales pipeline and conversion rates
Create and manage sales tools, templates, and collateral
Identify process improvements and support implementation
Provide training on CRM systems and sales tools

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, or related field

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, vision, and life insurance
